error_signature: Telegram trigger stops responding to incoming messages
title: Telegram trigger not responding after inactivity
symptom: The Telegram webhook trigger stops responding to messages after a period of inactivity, requiring manual reactivation to function again.
applies_when: Workflow has been inactive for some time
not_this_if: Workflow is continuously active or has not been inactive
root_cause: When multiple Telegram triggers are created with the same production link, it can cause conflicts that lead to the webhook becoming unresponsive. This happens because the system cannot distinguish between the triggers, leading to issues with message delivery.
fix_steps: Identify any duplicate Telegram triggers in your workflows
Ensure each trigger has a unique production link
Save the changes and test the workflow again
agent_instruction: Check for duplicate Telegram triggers and assign unique production links to each.
